pub enum InferenceError {
    #[error("failed to spawn inference server: {0}")]
    SpawnFailed(#[from] io::Error),
    #[error("IPC error: {0}")]
    Ipc(String),
    #[error("inference server error: {0}")]
    ServerError(String),
    #[error("timeout waiting for inference server")]
    Timeout,
    #[error("PNG encode/decode error: {0}")]
    ImageError(String),
}
